name: Synthetic Studio
subtitle: Crafting identity
introText: Welcome to Synthetic Studio. Crafting identity. This is where your journey continues.
completionText: You have mastered Synthetic Studio. The Identity Shards you've gathered here will echo through every room that follows.
guideIntroLine: Who are we becoming? This studio is where we find out.

transformationStages.name: Synthetic Studio — Bare Bones
transformationStages.description: The room in its raw state. Synthetic Studio evolves as you progress.

transformationStages.description: Basic improvements visible. Synthetic Studio evolves as you progress.

transformationStages.name: Synthetic Studio — Advanced
transformationStages.description: High-tech transformation. Synthetic Studio evolves as you progress.

transformationStages.name: Synthetic Studio — Mastered
transformationStages.description: The room at its peak. Synthetic Studio evolves as you progress.

midSceneTwist.description: Something changes in the Synthetic Studio. The rules aren't what they were.
midSceneTwist.effectDescription: New mechanics unlock in Synthetic Studio. Event rates increase.

roomLaw.name: Law of Identity Flux
roomLaw.description: This room changes if you over-optimize
roomLaw.mechanic: Perfect play triggers a reality shift that alters room mechanics

landmark.name: The Identity Mirror
landmark.description: A reflective surface that evolves into a consciousness engine
evolutionStages: A cracked mirror reflecting a distorted image
The reflection begins moving independently of you
Multiple reflections show different versions of yourself
The mirror becomes a window into synthetic consciousness
The Identity Mirror reflects who you are becoming, not who you were

hazard.name: Identity Erosion
hazard.description: Creating too many expressions dilutes authenticity
hazard.triggerCondition: Expression output exceeds authentic creation capacity
hazard.penalty: Expression value degrades as authenticity score drops

stabilizer.name: Core Memory
stabilizer.description: Anchoring to a core identity prevents erosion
stabilizer.mechanic: Selecting a core memory anchor maintains authenticity through high expression output

completionCeremony: The studio recognizes you as its original creator
